2024Founded
Our Story

Where Raw Materials Become Living Art

Earthform was born on August 10, 2024, just after founder Aneesha completed her O-Level examinations. What began as a creative idea soon blossomed into a passion for designing unique, handcrafted cement pieces that bring character and elegance into every home.

Every piece is thoughtfully made with care, turning raw materials into beautiful forms that elevate everyday spaces. Simple yet meaningful. Modern yet timeless.


Start Your Order

I didn't have much — only hope, determination, and a vision to create something unique.

— Aneesha Shahnaz Nassar, Founder

I'm Aneesha Shahnaz Nassar, the founder of Earthform. I began this journey at 16, shortly after my O-Level examinations. I didn't even have the proper supplies or funds when I first started.

With my very first order, I used the money I earned to invest back into the business, building it step by step. Today, at 18, I continue to grow Earthform with knowledge, confidence, and pride.

Founder · Designer · Maker
What We Make

Handcrafted with Purpose

Each piece is durable, handcrafted, and made using sustainable materials — making them both stylish and environmentally responsible.

Sea Shell

A stunning cement conch shell sculpted with fine texture detail — perfect as a tray, jewellery holder, or decorative accent.

Handcrafted

Cloud Tray

A bold heart-shaped cement tray with a dramatic bubble border and striking splatter finish — a true statement piece.

Bold & Unique

Flower Tray

Soft bubble-edged round trays in pastel and neutral tones — ideal for rings, trinkets, or as a calming centrepiece.

Customizable Colors

Design Tray

A beautifully engraved mandala cement coaster — intricate geometric patterns pressed into smooth cement.

Detailed Craft

Mini House

A charming cement house with cutout windows and a textured roof — brings warmth and character to any shelf or garden.

Decorative

Custom Orders

Choose your shape, color, and size. Personalized pieces for gifts, events, weddings, and bulk orders — made to your vision.

Fully Personalised
Our Commitment

Built to Last, Better for Earth

At Earthform, sustainability isn't an afterthought — it's the foundation. We believe beautiful décor and environmental responsibility can coexist.

🌱
Eco-Friendly MaterialsResponsibly sourced cement and natural pigments with minimal environmental impact.
♻️
Zero-Waste ProductionExcess cement is repurposed into samples or smaller pieces — nothing goes to waste.
⏳
Built to LastLong-lasting pieces reduce the need to replace décor, minimizing waste over time.
100%Handmade, No Mass Production
0Harmful Chemicals Used
∞Lifespan With Proper Care
Tailored for You

Custom Orders, Your Vision

Whether it's a personalized gift, an event giveaway, or a unique piece for your home — Earthform crafts it to your exact preferences.

🎨Choose Your ColorMatch your home décor with custom color preferences.
📦Bulk OrdersPerfect for events, weddings, and corporate gifting.
🎁Gift SetsBeautifully packaged sets for any occasion.

"Every piece is made with attention to quality and detail — whether it's one item or fifty."

Send us a message with your vision and we'll walk you through the process, from color selection to delivery.

Out in the World

Our Stalls

From vibrant markets to university bazaars — Earthform has been showing up, one stall at a time.

01
27 September 2025

Island Market

Our very first public stall — the moment Earthform stepped out into the world. Cloud Trays, Sea Shells, and Design Trays drew in curious eyes and happy customers from the very first hour.

NIBM — Halloween Stall
